stem: In right triangle ABC, angle C is the right angle and BC = 180. Point D on side AB is connected by a line segment with point E on side AC such that segment DE is parallel to side BC and CE = 4·AE. What is the length of segment DE?
rationale: Because DE ∥ BC, triangles ADE and ABC are similar with similarity ratio AE/AC. Since CE = 4·AE, AC = AE + CE = 5·AE, so AE/AC = 1/5. Therefore DE = BC × 1/5 = 180/5 = 36.
